name: General IT Services Contract Checklist
description: Standard checklist for IT service agreements and vendor contracts

questions.question: Does the contract clearly define the scope of IT services to be provided?
Are Service Level Agreements (SLAs) clearly defined with measurable metrics?
Does the contract specify uptime guarantees and availability requirements?
Are response times for support and incident resolution clearly defined?
Does the contract include data backup and recovery procedures?
Are security requirements and compliance standards specified?
Does the contract address intellectual property rights and ownership?
Are pricing terms and payment schedules clearly defined?
Does the contract include confidentiality and non-disclosure provisions?
Are termination conditions and notice periods specified?
Does the contract include liability limitations and indemnification clauses?
Are change management procedures defined for service modifications?
